title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial for building a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The system coordinates four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itinerary planning, and final responses, integrating PostgreSQL for memory, Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, and external APIs for real-time data.
